ccel.title: NPNF2-07. Cyril of Jerusalem, Gregory Nazianzen

title: Letter XXVIII.

source.title: NPNF2-07. Cyril of Jerusalem, Gregory Nazianzen

verses.text: In visiting the mountain cities which border on Pamphylia I fished up in the Mountains a sea Glaucus; I did not drag the fish out of the depths with a net of flax, but I snared my game with the love of a friend.
And having once taught my Glaucus to travel by land, I sent him as the bearer of a letter to Your Goodness.
Please receive him kindly, and honour him with the hospitality commended in the Bible, not forgetting the vegetables.
